summary: Iteration 52: Verified all 11 features for hidden demo account filtering and label changes. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend verified 'no logged spins' label on collection tiles and RecordDetailPage StatCard, 'No Logged Spins' sort option in dropdown, Add Record page works on mobile, Fresh Pressings with 24h cache works.
passed_tests: 1. 'no logged spins' label appears on CollectionPage record tiles when spin_count is 0 (Line 388-393) - VERIFIED via UI screenshot
2. 'no logged spins' appears on RecordDetailPage StatCard when spin_count is 0 (Line 245-256, noSpinsLabel prop) - VERIFIED via UI screenshot
3. Collection sort dropdown shows 'No Logged Spins' option (Line 38: value='never_spun', label='No Logged Spins') - VERIFIED via UI screenshot
4. Fresh Pressings endpoint GET /api/explore/fresh-pressings returns data with cache - VERIFIED via pytest
5. Add Record endpoint POST /api/records works correctly - VERIFIED via pytest
6. Demo account (user_id: 9221572c-1d80-4274-8393-77f0b2fdffc4) content is hidden from GET /api/explore - VERIFIED via pytest
7. Demo account content is hidden from GET /api/listings - VERIFIED via pytest
8. Demo account content is hidden from GET /api/search/posts - VERIFIED via pytest
9. Demo account content is hidden from GET /api/iso/community - VERIFIED via pytest
10. Demo account content is hidden from GET /api/buzzing - VERIFIED via pytest
11. Demo account content is hidden from GET /api/feed (own posts still appear for self) - VERIFIED via pytest
critical_code_review_comments: database.py Line 94-97: get_hidden_user_ids() correctly queries users with is_hidden=True
hive.py Line 326-327: /feed endpoint uses visible_ids = [uid for uid in following_ids if uid not in hidden_ids]
hive.py Line 343-344: /explore endpoint uses query = {'user_id': {'$nin': hidden_ids}}
honeypot.py Line 89-91: /iso/community uses exclude_ids = list(set([user['id']] + hidden_ids))
explore.py Line 299-337: /explore/fresh-pressings uses MongoDB cache collection with 24h TTL
CollectionPage.js Line 38: Sort option 'never_spun' correctly labeled as 'No Logged Spins'
CollectionPage.js Line 389-392: Badge shows 'no logged spins' when spin_count === 0
RecordDetailPage.js Line 141, 245-256: StatCard with noSpinsLabel shows 'no logged spins' when value === 0
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account with is_hidden=True
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52: All features verified. Key implementations: 1) get_hidden_user_ids() helper in database.py returns list of user IDs where is_hidden=True, 2) All public feed endpoints (/explore, /listings, /search/posts, /iso/community, /buzzing) filter out hidden users using $nin MongoDB operator, 3) /feed shows own posts for hidden user (expected behavior), 4) Fresh Pressings uses MongoDB 'cache' collection with 24h TTL stored as ISO date string, 5) Frontend shows 'no logged spins' (lowercase) on collection tiles and StatCard when spin_count is 0, 6) Sort dropdown option is 'No Logged Spins' (title case). Demo account has 156 records in collection, test record additions work via POST /api/records.
